series_metadata.series_description: Non-federal grant files containing grant applications, grant awards, programmatic and financial reports, budgets, payment letters, program specific audits and correspondence regarding the grant.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office two (2) years end of grant period, audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved. Electronically scan Receipt of Acceptance, Project Description/Narrative, Award Notice, Final Payment/Closeout Letter, and documents relating any legal issues (i.e. special audits, IRS liens, etc.)
